lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mmm... looks like that camel would make a nice kebab.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That camel looks vicious, it'll probably eat me if I go too near!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wonder if I can catch something from that camel?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mmm... looks like that camel would make a nice kebab.

lines.speaker: Camel
lines.text: You and whose army mate? You and whose army?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oooh, sorry, didn't realise you could hear me?

lines.speaker: Camel
lines.text: Well I can, so watch what you say in future.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That camel looks vicious, it'll probably eat me if I go too near!

lines.speaker: Camel
lines.text: Well, I have to say, I am pretty peckish, but thankfully, I don't eat humans... often.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oooh, sorry, didn't realise you could hear me?

lines.speaker: Camel
lines.text: Well I can, so watch what you say in future.

lines.speaker: Camel
lines.text: You'll catch a stiff kick if you talk about me like that again!
